creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
For some reason the Makefile from lang/php81 hasn't been copied appropriately. strip(1) must be applied conditionally. Patch attached. 2022Q4 is still a month away.

> root@deblndw013x3j:/var/tmp/freebsd-ports/lang/php82 (2022Q3 *=)
> # git diff .
> diff --git a/lang/php82/Makefile b/lang/php82/Makefile
> index ea7b5914e..751f0bab5 100644
> --- a/lang/php82/Makefile
> +++ b/lang/php82/Makefile
> @@ -148,13 +148,23 @@ test: build
>     @(cd ${WRKSRC} && ${MAKE} test)
> 
>  post-install:
> -   ${STRIP_CMD} ${STAGEDIR}/${PREFIX}/bin/php-cgi
> -   ${STRIP_CMD} ${STAGEDIR}/${PREFIX}/bin/phpdbg
> -   ${STRIP_CMD} ${STAGEDIR}/${PREFIX}/bin/php
> -   ${STRIP_CMD} ${STAGEDIR}/${PREFIX}/lib/libphp.so
> -   ${STRIP_CMD} ${STAGEDIR}/${PREFIX}/sbin/php-fpm
> -   ${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/php.ini-development ${WRKSRC}/php.ini-production \
> +   @${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/php.ini-development ${WRKSRC}/php.ini-production \
>         ${WRKDIR}/php.conf ${STAGEDIR}/${PREFIX}/etc
> +
> +post-install-CGI-on:
> +   @${STRIP_CMD} ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin/php-cgi
> +
> +post-install-PHPDBG-on:
> +   @${STRIP_CMD} ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin/phpdbg
> +
> +post-install-CLI-on:
> +   @${STRIP_CMD} ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin/php
> +
> +post-install-FPM-on:
> +   @${STRIP_CMD} ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/sbin/php-fpm
> +
> +post-install-EMBED-on:
> +   @${STRIP_CMD} ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/lib/libphp.so
>  .else
>  do-install:
>     ${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/${APACHEMODDIR}
>
